mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TOSS ( user_id, payment_key, order_id, amount, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{paymentKey}, #{orderId}, #{amount}, #{status}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, payment_key AS paymentKey, order_id AS orderId, amount, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM TOSS WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
